description_long: This house features a distinctive curved red roof with a prominent central arch, giving it a unique architectural character. The exterior walls are clad in a brick pattern, with tan accents on the corners and structural elements. Large, rectangular windows dominate the front and side facades, some of which are partially covered by overhanging roof sections. The house has multiple rooflines, including two smaller gabled sections flanking a central open entryway, and a main roof with a dramatic upward curve. The entryway is recessed and flanked by glass doors and windows, providing a welcoming and open appearance. The overall design blends traditional brickwork with modern, bold roof shapes, making it stand out in an urban neighborhood.
description: A brick-clad house with a dramatic curved red roof, large windows, and a recessed central entryway. The design combines traditional materials with modern rooflines and open glass features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, curved main roof, brick walls, and a smaller gabled section with a window.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large glass windows, central entryway, and the sweeping red roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the curved roof, brickwork, and a smaller gabled section with a window.
description_view_3: Rear or courtyard view showing two smaller gabled roof sections, a central open entryway, and multiple windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed central entryway with large glass doors and windows, flanked by brick columns and sheltered by an overhanging roof
